code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Retail_Inventory] --> Start
    Start --> ChooseOperation
    
    state ChooseOperation <<choice>>
    ChooseOperation --> DatabaseOperations : Database
    ChooseOperation --> TableOperations : Table
    ChooseOperation --> RowOperations : Row
    
    state DatabaseOperations {Retail_OrderManagement] --> SelectDatabaseOperation
        state SelectDatabaseOperation <<choice>>
        SelectDatabaseOperation --> CreateDatabase : Create
        SelectDatabaseOperation --> LoadDatabase : Load
        SelectDatabaseOperation --> SaveDatabase : Save
        CreateDatabase --> ValidateDatabase
        LoadDatabase --> ValidateDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Retail_Inventory]
        ValidateDatabase --> [Retail_Inventory]
    }
    
    state TableOperations {Retail_OrderManagement] --> SelectTableOperation
        state SelectTableOperation <<choice>>
        SelectTableOperation --> AddTable : Add
        SelectTableOperation --> CreateTable : Create
        SelectTableOperation --> DropTable : Drop
        SelectTableOperation --> GetTable : Get
        SelectTableOperation --> RenameTable : Rename
        SelectTableOperation --> UnionTables : Union
        SelectTableOperation --> ManageSchema : Manage Schema
        AddTable --> ValidateTable
        CreateTable --> ValidateTable
        DropTable --> [Retail_Inventory]
        GetTable --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]
        RenameTable --> [Retail_Inventory]
        UnionTables --> ValidateTable
        ManageSchema --> ValidateTable
        ValidateTable --> [Retail_PointOfSale]
    }
    
    state RowOperations {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> SelectRowOperation
        state SelectRowOperation <<choice>>
        SelectRowOperation --> InsertRow : Insert
        SelectRowOperation --> DeleteRow : Delete
        SelectRowOperation --> SelectData : Select
        SelectRowOperation --> UpdateData : Update
        InsertRow --> ValidateRow
        DeleteRow --> [Retail_Inventory]
        SelectData --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
        UpdateData --> ValidateRow
        ValidateRow --> [Retail_CouponSystem]
    }
    
    DatabaseOperations --> ChooseOperation
    TableOperations --> ChooseOperation
    RowOperations --> ChooseOperation
    
    ChooseOperation --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty] : Exit
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售库存系统设计一个状态图，核心是展示从库存管理出发，如何选择不同的操作层级——数据库、表还是行记录。起点应该是Retail_Inventory，然后进入一个选择节点。
明白了，ChooseOperation作为选择节点，分出三条支路：DatabaseOperations、TableOperations和RowOperations。这三个分支处理完后都要能回到ChooseOperation重新选择，对吗？另外退出路径是到哪里？
对的，循环回到ChooseOperation。退出时指向Retail_CustomerLoyalty。现在先细化DatabaseOperations这个复合状态——它从Retail_OrderManagement进入，内部有个选择节点SelectDatabaseOperation，提供Create、Load、Save三种操作。
好的，DatabaseOperations内部结构已添加。Create和Load之后都有ValidateDatabase校验，然后返回Retail_Inventory；Save直接回Retail_Inventory。接下来处理TableOperations？

TableOperations更复杂一些，同样从Retail_OrderManagement进入，SelectTableOperation提供七种操作：AddTable、CreateTable、DropTable、GetTable、RenameTable、UnionTables，还有ManageSchema。注意GetTable要指向Retail_CustomerLoyalty，其他大部分操作需要校验。
确认一下校验后的流向：AddTable、CreateTable、UnionTables、ManageSchema都经过ValidateTable，然后到Retail_PointOfSale；DropTable和RenameTable直接回Retail_Inventory；GetTable到Retail_CustomerLoyalty。这样对吗？
完全正确。最后是RowOperations，从Retail_CustomerLoyalty进入，SelectRowOperation提供InsertRow、DeleteRow、SelectData、UpdateData。Insert和Update需要校验，Delete回Retail_Inventory，SelectData去Retail_OrderManagement。
RowOperations已添加。校验节点ValidateRow之后指向Retail_CouponSystem。我检查一下整体结构——三个分支都能回到ChooseOperation，退出到Retail_CustomerLoyalty，各终端系统的连接也都对应上了。
很好，这个状态图完整展示了零售库存系统的操作层级和系统间的流转关系。从库存出发，通过选择节点分层处理数据库、表、行操作，最终连接到订单管理、客户忠诚、POS和优惠券系统。
